creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
The port was marked BROKEN by the following commit on Dec 10 22:16:20 2018 UTC:

  https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=487205

and, after no one addressed the problem in 6 months, removed by the following commit on May 9 15:03:38 2019 UTC:

  https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=501106

I think you will have to go investigate these links, and possibly the build error logs on the cluster, to figure out why this happened.
